title: Generate a GraphQL API for User Profiles
scenario: Create a GraphQL API for user profiles, including endpoints for retrieving user information, updating profile details, and managing user permissions. The API should also include a feature to retrieve a user's activity log. The output should be a well-structured code snippet with clear comments and documentation.
constraints: Must use a popular GraphQL library (e.g. Apollo Server, GraphQL.js)
Must include at least 4 GraphQL types for user profiles

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the code snippet adhere to the given constraints?
Is the GraphQL schema correct and well-structured?
Does the code snippet follow best practices for user authentication and access control?
